channel.title: シンガポール料理 on K-Life Hack
channel.description: Recent content in シンガポール料理 on K-Life Hack

item.title: 望遠洞に発見！元フレンチシェフが織りなす、シンガポール＆マレーシア絶品ラクサ『長靴をはいた猫』
item.description:
<div class="k-map-notice" style="padding: 12px 20px; background: var(--themeBg-sec); border-top: 1px solid var(--themeBd-color); font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--themeC); opacity: 0.7;">
 <span style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 2px;">⚠️ Traveler's Note:</span>
 In fast-changing areas like 망원동, Google Maps may display outdated shop names or street views. 
 For the most accurate real-time location, we highly recommend using <b>Naver Maps</b>.
</div>
 <div class="k-map-buttons" style="background: var(--themeBg-sec); display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 15px 20px;">
 <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=%EC%84%9C%EC%9A%B8%ED%8A%B9%EB%B3%84%EC%8B%9C%20%EB%A7%88%ED%8F%AC%EA%B5%AC%20%EC%9B%94%EB%93%9C%EC%BB%B5%EB%A1%9C19%EA%B8%B8%2016%20%EC%A7%80%ED%95%98" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="background: rgb(66, 133, 244); border-radius: 12px; color: white; flex: 1 1 0%; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 10px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Google Maps</a>
 <a href="https://map.naver.com/p/search/%EB%A7%9D%EC%9B%90%EB%8F%99%20%EC%9E%A5%ED%99%94%EC%8B%A0%EC%9D%80%EA%B3%A0%EC%96%91%EC%9D%B4" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="background: rgb(0, 199, 60); border-radius: 12px; color: white; flex: 1 1 0%; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 10px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Naver Maps</a>
 </div>
</div>
